commands.repair_reason: External PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof plus security-aware rework; repair automation should not replace the missing contributor setup proof.; Needs attention: The diff changes runtime egress routing and currently weakens operator proxy policy for some media-provider traffic.; Review finding: [P2] Require NO_PROXY before direct loopback bypass — src/infra/net/proxy-fetch.ts:136-140 - [P2] Preserve... commands.review_summary:
The PR makes media audio/video provider execution pass the configured backend baseUrl into proxy-fetch resolution, adds target-aware NO_PROXY matching in proxy-fetch, and extends proxy runner tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main calls resolveProxyFetchFromEnv before the media backend baseUrl is known, so this runner path cannot apply target-aware NO_PROXY/CIDR handling at that seam. I did not exercise a live self-hosted STT backend in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof plus security-aware rework; repair automation should not replace the missing contributor setup proof.
